articles.title: NASA’s Webb captures a bizarre brain-shaped nebula around a dying star
articles.description: The James Webb Space Telescope has revealed new details in a bizarre nebula that looks like a brain floating in space. articles.description: A jury found that Kouri Richins killed her husband in March 2022 by poisoning him with a fentanyl-laced drink.

articles.title: Scientists identify secret ingredient in Leonardo da Vinci paintings
articles.description: "Old Masters" such as Leonardo da Vinci, Sandro Botticelli and Rembrandt may have used proteins, especially egg yolk, in their oil paintings, according to a new study.

articles.title: Silicon Valley Bank collapse renews calls to address disparities impacting entrepreneurs of color
articles.description: When customers at Silicon Valley Bank rushed to withdraw billions of dollars last month, venture capitalist Arlan Hamilton stepped in to help some of the founders of color who panicked about losing access to payroll funds.

articles.title: Scientists just discovered a tiny signal that volcanoes send before they erupt
articles.description: A new detection method called “Jerk” could dramatically improve how scientists forecast volcanic eruptions. articles.title: Life rebounded shockingly fast after the asteroid that killed the dinosaurs
articles.description: The asteroid impact that wiped out the dinosaurs didn’t keep life down for long. New research shows that microscopic plankton began evolving into new species within just a few thousand years—and possibly in under 2,000 years—after the disaster.
